gig_title: I will auto-generate 30 days of social media content
description:
🔧 I will auto-generate 30 days of social media content

I deliver a month of posts (text + video + gif) scheduled across platforms using n8n + Mautic + youtube-content + gif-search + ascii-art-creator.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• $300–$800/mo per client done-for-you
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($100, 3 days, 1 rev): Setup only, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($400, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 workflows, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($800, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited workflows, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goal (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 31-skill autonomous company.
